params.markdown:
**Overview**

This dashboard provides a comprehensive view of Tickets collected from Axonius.

It highlights the ticket activity across the environment, giving immediate visibility into the issues being raised and their overall impact. A breakdown of tickets by priority helps analysts quickly understand how many items fall into critical, high, medium, or low urgency categories. Status-based views provide a clear picture of ticket progression, showing how many are open, in progress, resolved, or pending.

Additional insights show trends in ticket volume over time, helping teams spot spikes, recurring problem periods, or seasonal patterns. A table of top reporters reveals which users or systems are generating the most tickets, supporting workload analysis and issue tracing. Essential ticket details are also surfaced to give analysts quick access to key fields needed for triage and investigation.

**Note:** Assets deleted from Axonius may reappear in a future discovery cycle if they are still present in connected data sources and get re-detected. Because the exact duration for which a deleted asset may remain dormant before being rediscovered is unknown, the transform retention period is set to **90 days** to reduce the risk of data loss for such assets. This means deleted assets will continue to appear in dashboards for up to 90 days after deletion.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/axonius)**
